# kSCNetworkConnectionSelectionOptionOnDemandRetry

**Global Variable**

The key associated with a Boolean value used to indicate whether a DNS query has already been issued for the specified on-demand host name.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSCNetworkConnectionSelectionOptionOnDemandRetry: String { get }
```

## Constants

- **kSCNetworkConnectionSelectionOptionOnDemandHostName**: The key associated with a host name used to select the “best” network connection.

items.description: The key associated with a host name used to select the “best” network connection.
